category_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe Nuspell as spellchecking software and a C++ library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use Nuspell; source_facts.name is nuspell.
docs_sources: Official Nuspell homepage links to a Documentation page with general and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/nuspell/nuspell, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe a fast safe spelling checker, C++ library, command-line tool, and Hunspell dictionary support.
